content:
# elizaos/cloud Daily Update (Apr 24, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on April 24, 2026, focused on resolving authentication issues within the Steward integration to ensure correct tenant identification during the OAuth flow.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

### Authentication & OAuth Fixes
*   Resolved a bug in `StewardLoginSection.handleOAuth()` where `tenantId` was incorrectly passed as camelCase instead of the required `tenant_id` snake_case format, causing the server to fall back to the default user. ([#471](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/pull/471))

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   None

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   None

## NEW ISSUES
*   None

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   None
